name: LyondellBasell Industries N.V.
description: LyondellBasell (LYB) is a global leader in the chemical industry, dedicated to creating solutions for everyday sustainable living. As one of the world's largest producers of polymers and a premier licensor of polyolefin technologies, the company develops and manufactures high-quality products that support essential sectors, including healthcare, transportation, and sustainable packaging. By leveraging advanced technology and fostering impactful collaborations, LyondellBasell is committed to driving innovation, enabling a circular and low-carbon economy, and delivering long-term value to its customers, investors, and society while maintaining a strong focus on safety and operational excellence.
